title: Harvest Marker
description: This resource package will allow you to view plantations as they are in their final stages.
body:
This resource pack adds a warning sign to the top of crops when they reach the harvestable stage.
List of blocks/plantations that contain an alert sign:

• Beetroots
• Carrots
• Nether Wart
• Potatoes
• Wheat
• Sweet Berries

I do not recommend using it with shaders, as the warning sign is just a texture added to the block texture, that is, when activating shaders and the plantations start to move, the warning sign will also move, causing a bug in the alert texture.

How to prevent this bug from happening:

• When activating the shaders, go to the shader settings and disable "Waving Foliage" so the crops will stop moving.
